Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 73 upvotes, 10 comments
  2. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 43 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 33 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 173 upvotes, 41 comments
  5. GitHub's Historic Uptime 265 upvotes, 71 comments
  6. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 241 upvotes, 74 comments
  7. Combinators 116 upvotes, 34 comments
  8. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1715 upvotes, 693 comments
  9. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 34 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 88 upvotes, 26 comments
  11. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 354 upvotes, 140 comments
  12. Nematophagous Fungus 19 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 119 upvotes, 42 comments
  14. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 342 upvotes, 149 comments
  15. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 47 upvotes, 14 comments
  16. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1747 upvotes, 867 comments
  17. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 45 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 36 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. I Traced My Traffic Through a Home Tailscale Exit Node 13 upvotes, 3 comments
  20. Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 240 upvotes, 150 comments
  21. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 177 upvotes, 109 comments
  22. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 35 upvotes, 18 comments
  23. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 111 upvotes, 77 comments
  24. 4D Doom 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 779 upvotes, 677 comments
  26. Show HN: PhAIL – Real-robot benchmark for AI models 17 upvotes, 8 comments
  27. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 29 upvotes, 18 comments
  28. Ask HN: Distributed data centers in our basements 31 upvotes, 49 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 104 upvotes, 203 comments
  30. Show HN: Cerno – CAPTCHA that targets LLM reasoning, not human biology 9 upvotes, 18 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
